mnemonics: JDK, SDK, AVD - Just Download & Start Developing (Java Development Kit, Software Development Kit, Android Virtual Device)
Gradle Files - The 'Grand' Recipe for App Building (Manages dependencies and builds your project)
keyPoints: Install Android Studio, the official IDE for Android development.
Download and configure the correct Android SDK (Software Development Kit) for your target API level.
Set up an AVD (Android Virtual Device) or connect a physical device for testing.
commonMistakes: Not installing the correct JDK version compatible with your Android Studio version.
Forgetting to enable 'Developer Options' and USB debugging on a physical Android device.
Not installing the necessary SDK platforms and tools for your app's minimum and target SDK versions.
